extDescription.message: Connects your browser to Personal Agent so the assistant can read and drive pages in your browser (a kind=browser device).
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the store and the browser's add-ons page.

instanceHint.message: Enter your Personal Agent server URL and Save — the OIDC issuer and client ID are fetched from the server automatically.
instanceHint.description: Help text under the Instance settings legend.

serverUrlLabel.description: Label for the server URL input; also used as the field name in validation errors.

advancedSummary.description: Toggle that reveals the optional OIDC override fields.

issuerLabel.description: Label for the OIDC issuer input; also used as the field name in validation errors.

issuerPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the optional OIDC issuer override input.

clientIdLabel.description: Label for the optional OAuth client ID input.

saveSettings.description: Button that saves the server configuration.

toolsHint.message: Uncheck a tool to hide it from the assistant entirely — it is neither announced nor executed. Write tools can change pages.
toolsHint.description: Help text explaining the tool checkboxes.

blockedHostsHint.message: The Personal Agent app origin and the OIDC issuer are always blocked, so the agent can never drive them.
blockedHostsHint.description: Help text under the blocked-hosts textarea.

saveToolsBtn.description: Button that saves the tool selection + blocked hosts.

connect.description: Primary button that signs in and connects the extension.

firstReviewPrompt.message: Choose which tools the assistant may use, then click Connect again.
firstReviewPrompt.description: Shown on the first connect so the user reviews the exposed tools before signing in.

saveValidFirst.description: Error when Connect is clicked with an invalid/unsaved server URL.

savedReconnect.description: Confirmation after saving the tool settings.

discovering.description: Transient status while fetching OIDC config from the server.

notRegistered.description: Device line when no device id exists yet.

deviceLabel.description: Device line with the short device id.

discoverFailed.message: Could not read settings from the server ($error$). Check the URL, or set the OIDC issuer under Advanced.

urlInvalid.description: Validation error for a malformed URL.

urlInsecure.message: $field$ must use https (http only for localhost).
urlInsecure.description: Validation error when a URL is not https.

writeTag.description: Tag marking a tool that can change pages.

status_signin_required.description: Connection status when a sign-in is needed.

status_not_configured.message: Not configured — fill in & save settings
status_not_configured.description: Connection status when the server isn't configured yet.

meetingDetected.message: Meeting detected - take notes with Personal Agent?
meetingDetected.description: Banner headline shown when a meeting platform is detected on the page.

meetingConsent.message: This records the meeting audio (tab + your microphone) and sends it to your Personal Agent for transcription. Everyone should be informed.
meetingConsent.description: Recording-consent notice shown in the meeting banner.

meetingCloseBtn.description: Button that dismisses the meeting banner without recording.

meetingRecording.description: Live state label while a meeting is being captured.

meetingUnsupported.message: Meeting capture could not be started.
meetingUnsupported.description: Error shown when capture cannot start (e.g. non-Chromium browser or denied permission).
